resources.string: Track monthly card spend across all currencies. Source detection is user-driven; no card brands or countries are pre-configured.
When you label a sender as a card source, future SMS or notifications from that sender will be captured here. Nothing is sent off the device.
Is this a card payment source?
We detected a payment-like message from %1$s. Confirm to label it for future automatic capture.

All card data is processed only on this device. No external server receives it. SMS and notifications are read from what the OS already has, and the original text is discarded after parsing. Card sources are labeled by you, not pre-classified by the system.
